title: Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church
tagline: Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Kerala

overview.short: Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church, Aruvithura, more familiarly known as Aruvithura Church, is a Syro-Malabar Catholic church located at Aruvithura, in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. Traditionally, it is believed that the Syrian Catholic Church at Aruvithura was established in the 1st century. The first edifice of the church at Aruvithura was made of granite stones in the manner of Hindu temples.

topPlaces.name: Erattupetta
topPlaces.description: Erattupetta (Malayalam pronunciation: [i:ra:tupe:ʈa]) is a municipality in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 40 km (24.9 mi) east of the district headquarters in Kottayam and about 157 km (97.6 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Elappunkal
topPlaces.description: Elappunkal is a village close to Erattupetta in the Kottayam district of Kerala state in India. It is situated on the Erattupetta–Thodupuzha state highway route.

topPlaces.name: Kalathukadavu
topPlaces.description: Kalathukadavu is a village abutting the Meenachil river in Kottayam district of Kerala, India. Kalathukadavu is situated between Erattupetta and Thodupuzha on a state highway.

topPlaces.name: Kondoor
topPlaces.description: Kondoor is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. Kondoor village is located near to Erattupetta.

topPlaces.name: Teekoy
topPlaces.description: Teekoy is a southern Indian village in the eastern part of Kottayam district in Kerala state. On 1 January 1962, it was established as a third grade gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Thalappalam
topPlaces.description: Thalappalam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Panackapalam
topPlaces.description: Panackapalam is a small town of meenachil taluk located in the Kottayam district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Perunilam
topPlaces.description: Perunilam is a small Village/hamlet in Meenachil Taluk in Kottayam district of Kerala State, India. It comes under Poonjar Panchayath.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: Stays in Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aruvithura St. George's Syro-Malabar Catholic Forane Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Erattupetta, Elappunkal, Kalathukadavu, Kondoor, Teekoy.
